code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut current = 0
mut in_num = false
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(byte)
    if byte >= 48 and byte <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (byte - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if count == 0
          a = current
        else if count == 1
          b = current
        end
        count = count + 1
        current = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  if count == 0
    a = current
  else if count == 1
    b = current
  end
end

mut x = a
mut y = b
while y != 0
  let r = x % y
  x = y
  y = r
end
println("gcd=#{x}")
